refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to address distinct aspects of worksite mapping, enabling focused design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-FR by confirming the generation and accuracy of terrain maps, obstacle data, and work-zone models against ground truth or sensor data.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work-zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain mapping.
DP2: Apply obstacle detection algorithms using sensor data and AI classification.
DP3: Use GIS-based digital work-zone modeling with dynamic updates.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to fulfill the sub-FRs respectively.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain mapping and obstacle detection.
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically decoupled by function but share sensor inputs; data interfaces must be well-defined to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensor data.
Risk of sensor data latency affecting real-time mapping accuracy.
Risk of AI misclassification in obstacle detection impacting safety.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data processing to isolate latency and classification risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) for processing.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote monitoring and teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the solution integrates all mapping functions; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Limited containment; risk of diffusion if mapping logic is duplicated in vehicle subsystems.
Minimal containment; high diffusion risk if mapping data is processed independently here.
Not responsible for mapping; high diffusion risk if mapping logic is duplicated.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing is centralized.
Risk of interface overload on Telemetry and Network Link interfaces.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate partitioning sensor data preprocessing to Vehicle module if performance issues arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of duplicating mapping logic in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if not carefully controlled.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Centralizing mapping in NGHE Solution module is appropriate given safety criticality and complexity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data and sensor inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor interface loads and consider offloading preprocessing to Vehicle if needed.
Define strict interface contracts to prevent diffusion of mapping logic.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets requirements and safety constraints with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work-zones within the worksite.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable.
Centralized processing in NGHE Solution module is feasible performance-wise.
open_risks: Sensor data latency and AI classification errors impacting mapping accuracy.
Potential performance bottlenecks in centralized processing.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of centralized mapping processing.
Validation of obstacle detection AI accuracy in representative environments.
